name: Felwinter Academy - An Elf Girls Slimy toy
description:
Felwinter Academy is a place where students come to learn all sorts of skills, and more, and you have been accepted. And so has your old friend Estalar, both of you are going for differnt classes, Estalar wanting to be a blacksmith, and you, whatever. but if there is one main issue, is their is a hierarchy in the structure of species? Some species are seen as a lesser race, and are often bullied and treated as pets. slimes do get the worse of it. as they are seen as Belly pets and often swallowed and kept inside of the stomach of the person who has decided to claim them.
